fields.default: Congratulations! You have been selected as a winner of the Agri Waste Innovation Challenge
fields.label: Subject

fields.default:
Dear {applicant_name},

We are thrilled to inform you that you have been selected as a winner of the Agri Waste Innovation Challenge!

Your project, submitted from {county}, stood out for its innovation, impact, and viability. The judging panel was impressed by your dedication to transforming agricultural waste into opportunity.

You have been awarded a €1,000 micro-grant to help grow your project. Our team will be in touch shortly with next steps regarding the grant disbursement and any onboarding requirements.

Congratulations once again. We look forward to supporting your journey!

Warm regards,
The Agri Waste Innovation Challenge Team
RedCross · IOMe · Airbus
fields.label: Email Body

fields.default: Thank you for your application to the Agri Waste Innovation Challenge
fields.label: Subject

fields.default:
Dear {applicant_name},

Thank you sincerely for taking the time to apply to the Agri Waste Innovation Challenge.

After a thorough review by our judging panel, we regret to inform you that your application was not selected for a micro-grant in this cycle.

This was an incredibly competitive process, and the quality of applications — including yours — was genuinely impressive. We encourage you to keep building your project and to apply again in future cycles.

We wish you every success in your entrepreneurial journey and hope to see your work continue to grow.

With appreciation,
The Agri Waste Innovation Challenge Team
RedCross · IOMe · Airbus
fields.label: Email Body
